description: Production-grade Claude Code toolkit by carlrannaberg (631 stars). 27 specialist subagents with expert delegation protocol (triage-expert routes to typescript-expert, react-expert, nestjs-expert, kafka, oracle, etc.). 13 slash commands. AGENTS.md defines mandatory delegation rules for complex tasks.
author: carlrannaberg
delegation_protocol: Read AGENTS.md for mandatory delegation rules. Use triage-expert first for unknown issues. Expert agents: typescript-expert, typescript-build-expert, typescript-type-expert, vitest-testing-expert, testing-expert, refactoring-expert, cli-expert, git-expert, linting-expert, github-actions-expert, devops-expert, nodejs-expert.
notes: NOT a fork of duthaho/claudekit — completely different toolkit. carlrannaberg is the original. Copy .claude/ to project root. AGENTS.md defines when/how to delegate to specific expert subagents.
